description_long: This is a modern wall-mounted radiator with a rectangular white backing panel and a series of evenly spaced, horizontal metallic tubes forming the heating element. The tubes are arranged in a ladder-like pattern, with a slight curvature outward from the wall, maximizing surface area for heat dissipation. The radiator features a visible pipe connection at the lower right corner, suggesting a water-based heating system. The metallic tubes have a glossy, reflective finish, contrasting with the matte white panel behind them. The overall design is sleek and minimalistic, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or utility spaces. The radiator appears robust and functional, with no decorative grille or cover beyond the exposed tube arrangement.
description: A sleek, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal metallic tubes on a white rectangular panel, featuring a visible pipe connection at the lower right. The design is modern and functional, with a glossy metal finish and a minimalistic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of horizontal metallic tubes and the white backing panel, with the pipe connection visible at the lower right.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the outward curvature of the metallic tubes and the slim profile of the radiator against the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the flat white backing panel, with no visible tubes or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth of the tubes and the radiator's mounting against the wall.
attribute_pipe_connections: single pipe connection at bottom right, horizontal orientation
